reviews.review_description: It was ok. I liked feeling like I was Superman flying through GEARS? It really has no purpose. Here's your homework assignment. Fast forward to the end of superman 3 when Gus plays the video game and Superman is avoiding rockets. Presto!
Interesting rail game but I'm not really sure what I'm supposed to do.
i love this kind of game

Dead simple but that was obvious from the screenshots. My complaint is that there isn't enough stereo separation. The game looks flat. That is a problem for a title that depends on a sensation of speed to be compelling.
I really enjoyed it! Simple but fun!

Very simple -look to play- mechanics and very fun. The collision area is going to take me some time to get used to as I thought I dodged a piece of scrap, but must have hit it. There is also some performance issues but they are minor and are probably more the Note 5 than the game. Still, for the value, definitely 5 stars. Watching this developer for future content.

EDIT: had to give this one only 4 stars after playing longer. The game seems to rely too heavily on random generation. To many times a door will open with a broken gear directly in the passage way causing a game over. The play should always have a way to succeed. Near impossible is ok. Impossible is game breaking.
It's the common VR game on avoiding objects, but is truly immersive, so thats a bonus.

reviews.review_title: Pretty ok, but needs some tweaks.
reviews.review_description: Those red things flying towards you really ruins the immersion of flying into a machine. If you'd remove those and instead make it go gradually faster and faster, then you'd have a really nice and trippy little game. Just played a dozen levels and then I got bored with it and quit.
Does not really give a sense of depth  compared to many other free apps. Also not particularly creative or artistically designed. Uninstalled.
